cast: Etchos,Ella Droko, Jaden Narwal, Hanna Tola
logline: A young immigrant artist confronts love, ambition, and systemic limbo as her pursuit of belonging collides with the realities of survival in a city that never fully lets her arrive.
title: Showstorm

cast: Jack Waters, Beni Boucher Gottesman, Mikki Murshed, Elias Olsson, Gonzalo R. Valadez
logline: A pizza delivery gone wrong summons a brutal vigilante who enforces tipping etiquette with extreme violence, turning one cheap customer's bad night into a bloody lesson in entitlement.
title: No Tip Tony
written: Jack Waters, Beni Boucher Gottesman, Mikki Murshed, Elias Olsson, Gonzalo R. Valadez, Jackson Lee

logline: A late-night ride spirals into a tense test of trust and control.
title: Driver

logline: A quiet portrait of ambition told through one decisive day.
title: One Small Step

cast: Andrew Powell, Sean Mcnear, Laura Burns, Lili Martin
logline: A young couple expecting their first child are confronted by their future selves, who arrive with a terrifying warning that forces them to decide whether love can truly change a doomed fate.
title: Two Of Us

cast: Aidan Springle, Ani Pham-Tran, Sean Fogarty, Berlin Westwood, Helan Bowles
logline: A socially withdrawn young man reimagines a simple trip to return a friend’s lost hat as a high-stakes spy mission, only to discover the real challenge is showing up and reconnecting with the people he’s been avoiding.
title: Tom Action - Spyman

logline: An intimate drama about holding on when everything shifts.
produced: Beni Boucher Gottesman and Jackson Lee
title: Abrazame Baby

cast: Daniel Nicholson, Sean Fogarty, Trinity Richardson, Greg Scaman, Jesse Boyko, Dennis Doherty, Laura Burns
logline: During his father’s chaotic funeral, a well-meaning son is forced to navigate clashing egos, buried resentments, and family dysfunction as grief turns a final goodbye into an emotional breaking point.
title: D Is For Dysfunctional Family

cast: River Karaca, Audrey Thirar, Navey Kubey, Ace De Castro
logline: [REDACTED] is an awkward, cynical teenager who realises that they may not know themselves as well as they thought. Accompanied by their three closest friends, they set off to discover their gender identity and provide a relatable yet insightful look at the trans experience through their ventures in new spaces and situations.
title: Redacted

cast: Leo Vieteeyes as Leo Isa Vieteeyes as Isa Drew Forster as Drew
logline: A new drug strips you and your pants down to your truest form.
title: Confetti
